subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou knowest well my grief and yearning, my burning anguish and my sorrow in these days, and I am powerless to give voice to my lamentations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و انت یا الهی تعلم حزنی و وجدی و احتراقی و شجنی فی ایامی و لااقدر ان ابث بثی
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for tests and difficulties, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
